titleStmt.title: SII 19.237: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao, Dines Chandra Sircar and G.S. Gai
No. 237. (A.R. No. 219 of 1923.) KĪḺAPPAḺUVŪR, UDAIYARPALAYAM TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPALLI DISTRICT. ON THE WEST WALL OF THE CENTRAL SHRINE, PAŚUPATĪŚVARA TEMPLE.

summary.p: This registers an endowment of 2(1/2) mā of land for burning a perpetual lamp in the temple of Maṟavanīśvara-grihattu-Mahādēvar at Śiṟu-Paḻuvūr with the daily supply of on uḻakku of ghee, by Maḻavar Koṅgaṇi Śenni-Nambiyār a maternal uncle of Aḍigaḷ Paḻuvēṭṭaraiyar Maṟavaṉ Kaṇḍaṉār after purchasing the same from Sāvāndi Māṟaṉ Māṟaṉ of the village in the name of Chaṇḍēśvara-Bhaṭāra for 15 kaḻañju of gold. This is probably an inscription of Uttama-Chōḷa.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakecaripanmaṟkku yāṇṭu 9Āvatu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu brahmadeyam
ciṟupaḻuvūr maṟavaniśvaragrihattu mahādevarkku Aṭikaḷ paḻuveṭṭaraiyar maṟavaṉ kaṇṭa nār māma
ṭikaḷ maḻavar koṅkaṇi cenninampiyār vaitta viḷakku Oṉṟu Itanukku nilamāvatu ciṟupaḻuvūrc
cāvā(n)n=ti māṟaṉ māṟaṉeṉ maṟavaniśvarattu caṇḍeśvara piṭārarkku viṟṟukkuṭutta nilañ ceṅ(ka)kuḷattiṉ tūm
piṉ kiḻ kiḻkkaḻaṉip peruvāykkāliṉ vaṭa vāykkāl nāṉ viṟṟukkuṭutta nilattukku
kiḻpāṟkkellai toḻūrp pālāśrīyan bhaṭṭan nakkan nārāyaṇanum tampimār nilattukkum ciṟu
paḻuvurc cāvā(na)ntibhaṭṭan Iravi mahāyeśvaranum Aṉubhavikkinṟa nilattukku meṟkku m tenpāṟkkellai peruvāykkālukku
vaṭakkum melpāṟkkellai terpoku Oḻukkaikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai Ēḻumā vāyk kālukkut teṟkkum Ivvicai
tta perunānkellaiyilk kiṇaṟu Uḷpaṭa Irumāvaraic ceyyum nen Iccaṇḍeśvara paṭārarkku viṟṟuk koṇṭa pon [10 5]� viṟṟu
Iccaṇḍeśvarapaṭārariṭaiye Innilam Irumāvaraic caiyum 10 5[�] poṉ kuṭuttuk koṇṭu Itanil pokam nicati Uḻa
kku ney non=tāviḷakku Erippataṟkku vaiytten maḻavan koṅkaṇi cenni nampiyen Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 19.237 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
